titleStmt.title: SII 4.260: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri

No. 260. (A.R. No. 31 of 1889). ON A SLAB At the top are ent in relief the following figures:—The Crescent and Sun; and below these, a standing worshipper with jaṭas on his head, a liṅga on a pedestal, a dagger pointing upwards and a standing bull with long horns facing the linga.SET UP TO THE RIGHT OF THE DURGA SHRINE WITHIN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbha[vē .] 1
śrīmadgaurīsamētaṁ nelasiralidu tāṁ takkudī puṇyatīrtthaśrī meyvettoppuvī hēmaśile
yidenutuṁ tacchilēṁdrāgrameṁduṁ . dhāmantānāge santaṁ nelasi sogayipā śrīvirūpā
kṣadēvaṁ prēmaṁ kaigaṇmalī maidunacavuḍanabhīṣṭārtthamaṁ māḍugeṁduṁ [. 2*] naḷitōḷśākhegaḷaṁ
taḷaṁ taḷirgaḷaṁ vṛttastanaṁ pauṟpamaṁ viḷasatkuṁtaḷamāḷe bhṛṁgatatiyaṁ niḷdōḷveralkuṭmaḷaṁ . gaḷa celvaṁ gele kalpa
vaikṣadavolā paṁpāṁbikādēvi kōmaḷe cauḍayyana kānte hācalege māḷkiṣṭārtthasaṁsiddhiyaṁ [. 3*] vārā
śiparītōdyaddhāriṇimadhyamenaleseva mēruva teṁkal . rārājipa kuṁtaḷadharegōrantire balla
kuṁdenāḍesadirkkuṁ [. 4*] Ā nāḷke paṭṭaṇaṁ lakṣmīniḷayaṁ tānenippa kuṟugōḍadanu. rvvīnutakalidēvanṛ
paṁ tānolaviṁ pāḷisuttamire paṇivaṁśaṁ [. 5*] phaḷitasurakujada celvaṁ taḷedirddā ballakuṁdenāḍoḷtaḷtoṁ-.
doḷgoṁbene doravadināḍeḷeyoḷ raṁjipudu nōḍe nāḍugaḷarasaṁ [. 6*] Ā doravadināḍoḷpaṁpātīrtthami
ppudadentana . vilasadgaṁgānadiyiṁ halavuṁ tīrtthaṁgaḷiṁ sudēvāyatanā.valiyiṁ tāpasata
tiyiṁ saleyoppuvudakhiḷajanmapāpāpaharaṁ [. 7*] mattaveṁtappudeṁdaḍe . Adu puṇyōdaya
janmabhūmi duritaughacchēdanāvāsamabhyudayānīkaphaḷapradaṁ sukhalatāsaṁvarddha nakṣētramā-.
gadu bhaktarggabhivāṁchitārtthasukhamantānīva saṁsthānaveṁbudu lōkaṁ bhuvanatrayai
kahitamaṁ paṁpāvarakṣētramaṁ [. 8*] Aṁtappī sutīrtthadoḷ darmmōddharaṇaṁ māḍida mai
dunacauḍayyananvayaveṁtene . kāmavvenāyakitiyuṁ sōmeyaheggaḍeyu
mesayaloḍavuṭṭidaru . ddāmaguṇar siriverasā sōmaṁ dugdhābdhiyalli huṭṭuva teṟadiṁ [. 9*]
Ā kāmavenāyakitige lōkastutanappa lakṣmaṇaṁ mādayyaṁ . svīkṛtaguṇa nācayyaṁ
bhūkāntartta nayarādariṁtī mūvar [. 10*] siḍileseva kāypinīśana kaḍugōpamanaṁtakana
lasanmasakamana . ydoḍagūḍi lakṣmaṇana tāṁ paḍedaṁ muṁ dhātṛ baḷike jagamaṁ paḍedaṁ [. 11*] śaravarṣa
manarisēnage hiraṇyavarṣamane budharge karpūrada ba.lsariyaṁ samastajanakādaradiṁ
daṁ kaṟevudalte mādhavahastaṁ [. 12*] bilviḍidavargaḷ tegeyalkalvarddhāriṇiyoḷellamidu vipa
rītaṁ . bilviddeyācigāṁkaṁ bilviḍidaḍe tegevudahitamaṁḍalamattal [. 13*] va . Antu bhuvana
dante mūvarttanayaruṁ vīrakkaṁ vitaraṇakkaṁ neleyenisi yirmmaḍirācamalladēvā
patyanappa śrīvīrakalidēvarasara rājyāṁbhōdhipravarddhanacaṁdrarenisi kuṟugōḍoḷsukha
diṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirddavarōḷ virūpākṣatīrttharakṣaṇārtthaṁ sāmantamādeya
nāyakaṁ mataṁgaparvvatamaṁ pratipāḷisuttamire . © kāmavveyoḍaneRead huṭṭida.ha
ṭṭida sōmeyaheggaḍegameseva kācavvegamu.ddāmaguṇaneseye puṭṭidanī mahi baṇnisuti
ralke maidunacauḍaṁ [. 14*] Ātana balpa nātanavudāryyama nātana tējamaṁ samaṁ tātana pu
ṇyaduṁnatiya nātana lakṣmiyanātanoḷguṇa.vrātama nātanudbhavamanātana dharmma
ratatva maṁdaliṁ tīteṟaneṁdu baṇnipoḍe vāsugiyallade mikkarārpparē [. 15*] Ādoḍa mennaṟiva
nittaṁ baṇnipenadeṁtene . haralallada cintāmaṇi maranallada kalpabhūruhaṁ paśute
yanāṁ.tirada suradhēnuveṁdī dhare pogaḷguṁ cauḍigāṁkanī vunnatiyaṁ [. 16*] Olisuvudarida
baleyaraṁ sale mēlpiṁ balpiniṁde saṁgaradoḷtaṁ . nalagina moneyoḷe cauḍaṇanolisida
pari hosatu nōḍe vijayaśrīyaṁ [. 17*] seḍedu davānaḷaṁ naḍeyutirppudu pulviḍidāṁta
bhītiyiṁ miḍukuvudaltu nīroḷagaṇiṁ baḍavānaḷanappi śaṁbhuvaṁ . biḍade lalāṭanētraśikhiyā
dudu cauḍana tējadēḷgeyuggaḍakagidugravahni yenalārgaḷa tējamanāṁtu bāḷvavar [. 18*] Antu negaḷda
cauḍayyaṁ sāmantalakṣmīdharanaṁ meccisi bhāvanagaṁdhavāraṇameṁba birudaṁ paḍedu . harideydī
ḍaṭṭi muṭṭittaḍasi hiḍidudottittu suttittu kuttittorasittettittu bīsittogedudodedudīḍāḍi tauṁkittu
ruḷci.tturamaṁ meṭṭittu māṟāṁtara naḍidaḍe hoydokkilikkittu kāypiṁ dhuradoḷsāmaṁtalakṣmīdharana ma
yidunaṁ cauḍaneṁbā madēbhaṁ [. 19*] Aṁkusake nilvuvānegaḷaṁkusakidu nilvudaltu lakṣmana nuḍiyeṁ .
baṁkusake nilvudukkina ḍoṁkige niṁdapude cauḍaneṁba madēbhaṁ [. 20*] haritanuvina sasibiṁbada harakaṁṭhada ka
ppu piṁge cavuḍana jasadiṁ . siri hariyaṁ kumudini śaśadharanaṁ śaṁkarana nagajeyaṟiyaḷ ku
ṟupiṁ [. 21*] kēsavaheggaḍegaṁ mahimāsaubhāgyayute mādalegamudayisidā . bhāsurasupuṇye
hācale bhūsaṁstutanappa cauḍayana vidhuReadvadu.vādaḷ [. 22*] Ākeya guṇarūpātiśayaveṁtane .
doreyē cauḍayyanudyatsatiyenisida hācavvegī dhātriyoḷbhāsuracāturyyōktiyiṁ
vāgvadhu sobaginoḷā raṁbe saubhāgyadiṁdaṁ . varagaṁgādēvi śaucavratadoḷe negaḷdā sīte
yaudāryyadiṁdaṁ surabhūjaṁ rūpiniṁdaṁ rati siri viḷasallakṣaṇānīkadiṁdaṁ . © 23
Anupamapātradānavarahastini śaṁbhupadāraviṁdacittini duritaughaśaṁkini lasaccavuḍayya
na hṛtsarōjapa.dmini yene nālkujātiyabaḷāguṇamaṁ guṇadiṁde tāḷdidaḷ vinayanidhāne he
ggaḍiti hācaleyeṁbudu dhāriṇījanaṁ [. 24*] Aydemadanāstradaṁtiralaydudabiṁdugaḷanāṁ
ta śuktikevol mu.ttayde yenippaḷ lakṣmana mayduna cauḍaṇana vanite hācale yeṁduṁ [. 25*] kaliheggaḍe
cauḍaṁgaṁ sulalitamūrttiyenisirdda hācalegaṁ ni.rmmaḷekāmavveyumanupamaviḷāsi lakmale
yumādarirvvar suteyar [. 26*] Avaroḷagagraje kāvavegavikaḷapuṇyayutegeseye vallabha
nādaṁ . bhuvananutaṁ mādayyaṁ vivēki yācayyanāyaka priyatanayaṁ [. 27*] Ā kāmavveya lakmaleyā
kāramanavara puṇyamaṁ saubhāgya.śvīkṛtamaneseva guṇamaṁ lōkaṁ baṇnisuvudavara vākcaturateyaṁ [. 28*]
[A]ntu putramitragōtrabaṁdhuśiṣṭaviśiṣṭajanarakṣaṇeyaṁ māḍuttaṁ . dhanamaṁ baytiḍaleṁdu
pēḷpaḍenanēRead ºvanē.dānakke dharmmakke sajjanarggiṣṭarggeredargge bāṁdhavarge jīrṇnōddhārasaṁsthāpana.kkaniśaṁ
māḍuva dēvatārccanake yeṁdeṁdārjjipeṁ bēṟasadviniyōgakke daleṁdu pēḷpaḍevanē cauḍayyanēṁ
caṁdadiṁ [. 29*]

paṁpādēvige neṟi celvaṁ paḍedire kaṁcinamaḷvaḍigaḷaṁ ceṁbo.nniṁ poḷeva kaḷaśavaṁ
bhuvanaṁ pogaḷal māḍisidaneseye cauḍayyaṁ [. 30*] mudade virūpā
kṣagṛhakkodavida paṁpālayakke bahmēśalasa.tsadanakke bhairavagṛhakkudāri
cauḍayyaneseye sūtevaḷiyisidaṁ [. 31*] mattamādēvagṛhaṁgaḷge . sogayipa ghaṁ
ṭe yaḍḍaṇige yāruti dhūpaghaṭaṁ suparyyaṇaṁ jagakaticalvanappa kaḷaśaṁ tiḷivaṭṭalesappa caṁ
danaṁ . mṛgamadadaṁpanikkuva sugaṁdhada sippu suvastrabhūṣaṇādigaḷananē
kamaṁ mudade maidunacauḍaṇa nitta noppiral [. 32*] patimāḷpa dharmmakāryyōṁnatiyaṁ tāṁ
muṁduvaridu māḍuva guṇaduṁ.natiyiṁ hācale paḍedaḷ kṣitiyoḷ strīra
tnamīkeyeṁboḷvesaraṁ [. 33*] paḍedoḍameyappudeṁtuṁ kiḍuvade kiḍadoḍame dharmmaveṁdārjjisuva.
rttaḍeyade dharmmavanāriṁ kaḍujāṇaro cauḍigāṁkanuṁ hācaleyuṁ [. 34*] © svasti śrīma
tsakana kālaṁ 1121 sale siddhārtthisaṁvatsaradalu haṁpātīrtthada sthānadēḷunūrvvaru mu
khyavāgi sāmantalakhkheyanāyaka mādeyanāyakana kaiyyaluttarā
yaṇasaṁkramaṇanimittavāgi maidunacauḍayyaṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍisikoṁ
ḍu sarvvabādheparihārārtthavāgi biṭṭa dattiyeṁtene . virūpākṣadēvara nivēdyakke Akki
baḷḷa 1 haṁpādēviya nivēdyakke Akki ba 1 bhairavadēvara nivēdyakke Akki ma 2
Antu nityapaḍiya nivēdyadakki hattumānakkeṁdu haṁpeyakaṭṭeya bayaloḷage
kaḷḷiyakaḷadaṟeyiṁ mūḍa Osarakaḍahiṁ baḍaga bammiseṭṭiya hasaliṁ teṁka kiṟuga
ḍaliṁ paḍuva satakhaṁḍada gadde bījavari khaṁḍuga 1 koḷaga 5 Ā virūpākṣadēvara baladadese
ya satrasāleyalli Ātithyamukhyavāgi 10 manuṣya brāhmaṇara bhōjanakkeṁdu
Ā bayalaguṁḍina hasaliṁ mūḍa Oḍḍinaṟeyiṁ baḍaga bāykāliṁ paḍuva gaṭṭineṟe
yiṁ teṁka bījavari khaṁḍuga 2 koḷagaṁ 15 ṟa gaddeya mūkutiya hasalu 1 Ā
satrakkeṁdu hosaŪra Āgnēyadadeseya Eḍavaleya dāriyiṁ mūḍa luppinamō
ḷeyiṁ paḍuva keyi mattaru 1 kaṁba 450 manmukhatīrtthadiṁ mūḍa kōḍiyabenakaniṁ ba
ḍaga nāyakara dēvadōṭadiṁ teṁka ṇaḍakeyatōṭadoḷage heggaḍe rēcayyaṁ māḍisidirmma
ḍirācamallēśvaradēvargge yoṁdubhāgamaṁ kaḷeduḷida tannorbhāgadoḷage cauḍayyaṁ
virūpākṣadēvargge Aḍake 4 Ele 8 haṁpādēvige Aḍake 4 Ele 8 bhairavadēvarige Aḍake 2 E
le 4 maṁ dēvārccanege puṟpamumaṁ salisi mikkudaṁ jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ satrada mēlubīyakkaveṁ
du biṭṭa Aḍakeya tōṁṭa 1 nityapaḍiya niyōjeyiṁ salisi jīrṇnōddhārakkavi
ki mikkudaṁ kulabrahmapuriyāgi Uṁḍirppaneṁdu dēvayyaṁge cauḍayyaṁ dhāre Eṟa
du koṭṭa dattiThe line stops here. Between this and the following line some space is left blank on the
© svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē kaimiḥ [. 35*] Oḷavitiḷakaṁ rēvarasara magaṁ māramarasaṁ hēḷutānē barede śāsana .
Digital edition of SII 4.260 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
